about_accuracy_first_description: We use industry-standard formulas and rigorous testing to ensure every calculation is precise and reliable.
about_calculator_expertise_description_1: Our calculators are built using industry-standard formulas and best practices from financial planning, real estate, and investment management. Every calculation is tested for accuracy and validated against known benchmarks.
about_calculator_expertise_description_2: We understand that financial decisions require precision. That's why we've invested in creating calculators that professionals trust and individuals can rely on. From mortgage amortization to retirement planning, our tools provide the detailed analysis you need.
about_calculator_expertise_description_3: Whether you're a financial advisor helping clients, a real estate professional analyzing properties, or an individual planning your financial future, CalcPro provides the accuracy and reliability you need to make informed decisions.
about_continuous_improvement_description: We regularly update our calculators with new features and improvements based on user feedback.
about_customer_focused_description: We listen to our users and continuously improve based on feedback and real-world usage patterns.
about_financial_experts_description: Our team includes certified financial planners and software engineers with decades of combined experience.
about_join_thousands: Join thousands of professionals who trust CalcPro for their financial calculations.
about_metadata_description: Learn about CalcPro, our mission to provide professional financial calculation tools, and our commitment to accuracy and reliability.
about_mission_paragraph_1: At CalcPro, we believe that everyone deserves access to professional-grade financial calculation tools. Whether you're planning a mortgage, analyzing an investment, or preparing for retirement, our calculators provide the accuracy and reliability you need to make informed financial decisions.
about_mission_paragraph_2: We combine industry-standard formulas with modern technology to deliver a seamless experience that professionals trust and individuals can rely on. Our commitment to accuracy, security, and user experience drives everything we do.
about_security_privacy_description: Your financial data is encrypted and secure. We never share your calculations with third parties.
about_technology_leaders_description: Built with modern technology and best practices to ensure reliability, security, and performance.
about_user_centric_description: Every feature is designed with our users in mind. We prioritize ease of use and professional results.

faq_cant_find: Can't find what you're looking for? Our support team is here to help.
faq_features_api_answer: API access is available for Pro and Enterprise plans. Our RESTful API allows you to integrate calculator functionality into your own applications and workflows. Check our API documentation for details.
faq_features_calculators_answer: CalcPro offers four main calculator types: Mortgage Calculator (free for all users), Loan Calculator (Basic tier and above), Investment Calculator (Pro tier and above), and Retirement Calculator (Enterprise tier only). Enterprise plans also include custom calculator capabilities.
faq_features_export_answer: Yes! Basic plans can export to PDF. Pro plans support PDF, Excel, and CSV exports. Enterprise plans include all export formats plus API access for programmatic exports.
faq_features_share: Can I share calculations with others?
faq_features_share_answer: Yes, you can export your calculations and share them via email or download. Enterprise plans also include API access for integrating calculations into your own applications.
faq_features_stored_answer: Yes, we store your calculation history so you can access it later. Your data is encrypted and secure. You can view your calculation history in your account dashboard and export it at any time.
faq_general_accuracy_answer: All our calculators use industry-standard formulas and are regularly tested for accuracy. We ensure precise results for mortgage payments, loan amortization, investment projections, and retirement planning calculations.
faq_general_download: Do I need to download any software?
faq_general_download_answer: No, CalcPro is a web-based application. You can access all calculators directly from your browser on any device - desktop, tablet, or mobile. No downloads or installations required.
faq_general_mobile: Can I use CalcPro on mobile devices?
faq_general_mobile_answer: Yes! CalcPro is fully responsive and works seamlessly on mobile devices, tablets, and desktops. You can access all calculators and features from anywhere.
faq_general_what_is_answer: CalcPro is a professional calculator suite that provides accurate financial calculations for mortgages, loans, investments, and retirement planning. Our subscription-based platform offers powerful tools for businesses and individuals who need reliable financial calculations.
faq_hero_description: Find answers to common questions about CalcPro, subscriptions, features, and how to use our calculator suite.
faq_metadata_description: Find answers to common questions about CalcPro, subscriptions, and features.
faq_payment_billing_answer: Subscriptions are billed monthly on the same date you signed up. You'll receive an email receipt for each payment. You can view your billing history and update your payment method in your account settings.
faq_payment_fails: What happens if my payment fails?
faq_payment_fails_answer: If a payment fails, we'll notify you via email. You'll have a grace period to update your payment method. If payment isn't updated, your subscription will be paused until payment is successful.
faq_payment_invoice: Can I get an invoice for my subscription?
faq_payment_invoice_answer: Yes, you can download invoices from your account dashboard. All payments are automatically documented, and you'll receive email receipts for each transaction.
faq_payment_methods_answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and ACH transfers through our secure payment processor (Stripe). All payments are processed securely and encrypted.
faq_security_collect_answer: We collect only the data necessary to provide our service: your account information, subscription details, and calculation history. We never sell your data to third parties. See our Privacy Policy for full details.
faq_security_delete: Can I delete my account and data?
faq_security_delete_answer: Yes, you can delete your account at any time from your account settings. This will permanently delete all your data, including calculation history. This action cannot be undone.
faq_security_secure_answer: Yes, we take security seriously. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest. We use industry-standard security practices and regularly audit our systems. Your calculation data is private and never shared with third parties.
faq_subscriptions_cancel_answer: Yes, you can cancel your subscription at any time from your account settings. Your access will continue until the end of your current billing period. No cancellation fees apply.
faq_subscriptions_change: Can I change my plan later?
faq_subscriptions_change_answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your subscription plan at any time through the Manage Subscription button in your account settings. This opens the Stripe Customer Portal where you can change your plan. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle. Upgrades take effect immediately, while downgrades take effect at the end of your current billing period.
faq_subscriptions_exceed: What happens if I exceed my calculation limit?
faq_subscriptions_exceed_answer: If you exceed your monthly calculation limit, you'll need to wait until the next billing cycle or upgrade to a higher tier. Enterprise plans have unlimited calculations. We'll notify you when you're approaching your limit.
faq_subscriptions_plans: What subscription plans do you offer?
faq_subscriptions_plans_answer: We offer three subscription tiers: Basic ($9.99/month), Pro ($29.99/month), and Enterprise ($99.99/month). Each plan includes different features, calculation limits, and export options. All plans include a 14-day free trial.
faq_subscriptions_refunds_answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied with CalcPro, contact us within 14 days of your purchase for a full refund. After the trial period, refunds are handled on a case-by-case basis.
faq_subscriptions_trial_answer: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start your trial. You'll have full access to all features during the trial period.
faq_support_contact_answer: You can contact our support team via email at support@calcpro.com or through the contact form on our website. Pro and Enterprise customers can also access priority support channels.
faq_support_options_answer: Basic plans include email support. Pro plans include priority email support with faster response times. Enterprise plans include dedicated support with direct access to our team.
faq_support_training: Do you offer training or documentation?
faq_support_training_answer: Yes, we provide comprehensive documentation and guides for all calculators. Enterprise customers also receive personalized training sessions to help your team get the most out of CalcPro.

pricing_faq_change_plan_answer: Yes! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time through the Manage Subscription button in your account settings. This opens the Stripe Customer Portal where you can change your plan. Changes will be reflected in your next billing cycle.
pricing_faq_exceed_limit_answer: If you exceed your monthly calculation limit, you'll need to wait until the next billing cycle or upgrade to a higher tier. Enterprise plans have unlimited calculations.
pricing_faq_free_trial_answer: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required to start your trial.
pricing_faq_payment_methods: What payment methods do you accept?
pricing_faq_payment_methods_answer: We accept all major credit cards, debit cards, and ACH transfers through our secure payment processor.
pricing_faq_refunds_answer: We offer a 14-day money-back guarantee. If you're not satisfied, contact us within 14 days of your purchase for a full refund.
pricing_metadata_description: Choose the plan that's right for you. All plans include a 14-day free trial with full access. Simple, transparent pricing.
privacy_contact_text: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at
privacy_data_security_text: We implement appropriate security measures to protect your data from unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction. All data is encrypted in transit and at rest.
privacy_information_collect_text: We may collect personal information such as your name, email address, and payment details when you use our services. We also collect non-personal information such as browser type and usage data.
privacy_introduction_text: We value your privacy and are committed to protecting your personal information. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and safeguard your data when you use CalcPro services.
privacy_metadata_description: Learn how CalcPro protects your privacy and handles your personal information. Your data security is our priority.
shared_footer_admin_error_verifying: Error verifying admin code. Please try again.
shared_footer_company_tagline: Professional calculation tools for modern businesses
subscription_manage_failed: Failed to open customer portal. Please try again.
support_coming_soon_description: Our support center is currently under construction. Please check back soon or contact us directly for assistance.
support_description: Get help and support for CalcPro. This page is under construction.
terms_acceptance_text: By using CalcPro services, you agree to comply with and be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use our services.
terms_contact_text: If you have any questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us at
terms_limitation_text: CalcPro provides calculation tools for informational purposes. We are not liable for any damages arising from the use or inability to use our services, except as required by law. Calculations should be verified independently for critical decisions.
terms_metadata_description: Read our terms of service to understand the legal agreement for using CalcPro's professional financial calculation tools.
terms_subscription_access: Access continues until end of billing period after cancellation
terms_subscription_text: Subscriptions are billed monthly or annually based on your selected plan. You can cancel your subscription at any time.
terms_subscription_trial: 14-day free trial available for all plans
terms_user_accounts_text: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account information and for all activities that occur under your account.
metadata_cookies_description: Learn how CalcPro uses cookies and similar technologies to provide a better experience.
cookies_what_are_text: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help us remember your preferences, keep you signed in, and understand how you use CalcPro so we can improve it.
cookies_essential_text: Required for the site to function. These include session management, CSRF protection, and authentication tokens. You cannot opt out of these.
cookies_functional_text: Remember your preferences such as theme (light/dark mode) and language settings. Disabling them may affect your experience.
cookies_analytics_text: Help us understand how visitors interact with CalcPro (page views, performance metrics, feature usage). All data is anonymised and used only to improve the product.
cookies_third_party_text: Our payment processor (Stripe) and authentication provider (Firebase/Google) may set their own cookies governed by their respective privacy policies.
cookies_control_text: You can manage or delete cookies through your browser settings. Please note that disabling essential cookies will prevent you from signing in or using core features.
cookies_changes_text: We may update this policy as our use of cookies evolves. Material changes will be communicated via email or an in-app notice.
cookies_contact_text: For questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at
cookies_consent_message: We use essential cookies to keep you signed in and protect your account. We also use analytics cookies to improve CalcPro.
metadata_accessibility_description: CalcPro's commitment to digital accessibility and WCAG 2.1 AA compliance for all users.
accessibility_commitment_text: CalcPro is committed to ensuring digital accessibility for people with disabilities. We continually improve the user experience for everyone and apply relevant accessibility standards.
accessibility_standard_text: We aim to conform to the Web Content Accessibility Guidelines (WCAG) 2.1 Level AA. These guidelines explain how to make web content more accessible to people with disabilities.
accessibility_measures_text: CalcPro takes the following measures to ensure accessibility:
accessibility_measure_1: Semantic HTML elements used throughout the application
accessibility_measure_2: Keyboard navigation supported across all interactive elements
accessibility_measure_3: Sufficient colour contrast ratios (minimum 4.5:1 for normal text)
accessibility_measure_4: ARIA labels and roles applied to complex components
accessibility_measure_5: Focus indicators visible on all interactive elements
accessibility_measure_6: Lighthouse accessibility audits run during CI/CD pipeline
accessibility_known_issues_text: We are aware of the following areas that may not yet fully meet WCAG 2.1 AA standards and are actively working to resolve them:
accessibility_known_1: Some complex calculator input forms may benefit from improved screen-reader guidance — in progress.
accessibility_known_2: Manual testing with assistive technologies (NVDA, VoiceOver) is ongoing.
accessibility_feedback_text: We welcome feedback on the accessibility of CalcPro. If you experience barriers not listed above, please contact us:
accessibility_response_time: We aim to respond to accessibility feedback within 5 business days.
accessibility_last_reviewed: This statement was last reviewed on February 21, 2026.
support_calculators_desc: Learn how to use each calculator.
support_step_choose_plan: Choose a plan (or start your 14-day free trial)
support_step_pick_calculator: Pick a calculator from the dashboard
support_step_enter_inputs: Enter your inputs and hit Calculate
support_step_export: Export or save results for later reference
support_faq_link: Visit our FAQ page for common questions
support_change_plan: How do I change or cancel my plan?
support_change_plan_answer: Go to Account → Subscription → Manage Plan. You can upgrade, downgrade, or cancel at any time. Access continues until the end of the current billing period.
support_billing_answer: Monthly plans are charged on the same date each month. Annual plans are charged once per year. Your first charge occurs after the 14-day free trial ends.
support_export_question: How do I export calculation results?
support_export_answer: After running a calculation, click the Export button in the results panel. PDF and CSV formats are available depending on your plan.
support_reset_question: I forgot my password — how do I reset it?
support_reset_answer: Click "Forgot password?" on the sign-in page. A reset link will be sent to your registered email address.
support_calc_not_loading_answer: Try a hard refresh (Ctrl+Shift+R / Cmd+Shift+R). If the problem persists, clear your browser cache or try a different browser.
support_payment_failed_answer: Check your card details in Account → Billing. Ensure the billing address matches your bank's records. Contact your bank if the issue continues.
support_reach_out: Our support team is here for you. Reach out and we'll respond as quickly as possible.
api_authentication_text: All API endpoints require a valid Firebase ID token passed as a Bearer token in the Authorization header.
api_rate_limiting_text: API requests are rate-limited per user. Exceeding the limit returns a 429 Too Many Requests response. Limits reset every 60 seconds.
api_endpoint_types_desc: Returns available calculator types and whether each is accessible on your current subscription tier.
api_endpoint_calculate_desc: Runs a calculation. Pass a type (mortgage | loan | investment | retirement) and the corresponding inputs object.
api_endpoint_history_desc: Returns your paginated calculation history. Supports ?page=, ?limit=, and ?type= query parameters.
api_endpoint_export_desc: Exports a saved calculation result as PDF or CSV. Pass the calculation ID and desired format.
api_endpoint_usage_desc: Returns your current usage statistics and remaining quota for the billing period.
api_endpoint_subscription_current_desc: Returns your current subscription details including tier, status, and billing dates.
api_endpoint_subscription_portal_desc: Returns a Stripe Customer Portal URL to manage your subscription, payment method, and invoices.
api_endpoint_profile_desc: Returns the authenticated user's profile information.
api_endpoint_delete_desc: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's account and all associated data.
api_responses_text: All endpoints return JSON. Successful responses include a data field. Errors return an error string and an optional details field.
api_error_429: 429 Too Many Requests — Rate limit exceeded
api_error_500: 500 Internal Server Error — Unexpected server error
api_endpoint_export_data_desc: Downloads all personal data for the authenticated user as a JSON file (GDPR Article 20 — right to data portability).
api_endpoint_object_desc: Records the user's objection to marketing or analytics processing (GDPR Article 21 — right to object). Pass { processingType: 'marketing' | 'analytics' | 'all' }.
